articles.title: 'Avengers: Endgame' set for re-release with new title 'Avengers: Endgame Encore'; to feature additional footage linked to 'Doomsday'
articles.description: Marvel Studios is bringing back 'Avengers: Endgame' to cinemas this September as 'Avengers: Endgame Encore'. This special re-release will feature new footage and a post-credit scene designed to connect the film to the upcoming 'Avengers: Doomsday'. The theatrical event aims to set up the Multiverse Saga's conclusion, offering a fresh perspective on past events and their impact on future MCU narratives.

articles.title: 'Kyunki Saas Bhi Kabhi Bahu Thi 2' 24th June written update: Vaishnavi is forced to lie while Parth and Rio execute their revenge
articles.description: As Tulsi grapples with the toxic dynamics in her family, she confronts Parth about his manipulative tendencies. However, Nandini’s unwavering support undermines her efforts. Feeling cornered by Parth's threats, Vaishnavi withdraws her accusations, leaving Tulsi feeling desolate. Amid their scheming, Parth and Rio orchestrate a hasty business arrangement intertwined with a vengeful honeymoon, pushing Tulsi further into despair as betrayal looms over her family.

articles.title: Priyanka Chopra Feels She Hasn't Done Much In Hollywood As Compared To Her Bollywood Career
articles.description: Priyanka Chopra, who has been missing from Indian cinema for seven years, will be returning with Varanasi. Ahead of its release, the actress compared her career in Bollywood to Hollywood.

articles.title: When rain became a character in films
articles.description: Filmmakers worldwide have masterfully employed rain, not just as a backdrop, but as a potent narrative device. South Indian cinema, in particular, imbues rain with profound meaning. From the drought-breaking deluge in 'Vaishali' to the emotional downpour mirroring characters' struggles in 'Perumazhakalam,' and the romantic showers in Mani Ratnam's 'Alaipayuthey' and 'Mouna Ragam,' rain consistently amplifies cinematic storytelling.

articles.title: ‘6 Indian publishers contacted me’: Joe Sacco on his 2013 Muzaffarnagar riots graphic novel
articles.description: The Once and Future Riot, published in 2025, is a 135-page illustrated account of the 2013 Muzaffarnagar communal riots in western Uttar Pradesh, which left over 60 dead and 40,000 displaced.

articles.title: Madison Square Garden Permit Fuels Speculation Over Swift Wedding Event
articles.description: Taylor Swift and Travis Kelce are once again the focus of wedding rumors, with new details emerging regarding a permit requested to shut down streets around Madison Square Garden.

articles.title: Michael Jackson's Three Children: Where Are Prince, Paris And Blanket Aka Bigi Today?
articles.description: Michael Jackson's three children, Prince, Paris and Blanket grew up away from the spotlight after losing their father in 2009. Today, they have built individual identities through entertainment, activism and personal projects. Here's looking at what each one is doing.

articles.title: Ram Charan Visits Pawan Kalyan Following Peddi Success Celebrations - See Pics
articles.description: Ram Charan's recent release Peddi has earned over Rs 400 crore at the box office, making it the highest earning South Indian film of 2026.

articles.title: Tom Holland reveals adorable nickname for Zendaya at Rome premiere
articles.description: At the 'Spider-Man: Brand New Day' premiere in Rome, Tom Holland and Zendaya shared a heartwarming moment that showcased their closeness. Holland sweetly referred to Zendaya as 'Maree' when discussing their plans after the event, revealing a glimpse of their affectionate relationship. This interaction adds to the couple's narrative, especially after Holland recently announced their marriage, emphasizing the strength of their connection amid their busy careers.

articles.title: Diljit's Main Vaapas Aaunga crosses Rs 51 cr worldwide on Day 13
articles.description: 'Main Vaapas Aaunga,' directed by Imtiaz Ali, is witnessing an impressive revival at the box office, fueled by enthusiastic audience feedback. Following a subdued premiere, the partition-era tale has picked up steam during its second week. The film has now raked in over Rs 32 crore domestically and is on track to reach nearly Rs 52 crore worldwide, indicating its successful rebound.

articles.title: Anushka Ranjan opens up about IVF journey with Aditya Seal
articles.description: Anushka Ranjan has candidly spoken about her IVF journey, revealing the emotional and physical challenges she faced while trying to start a family with husband Aditya Seal. In a recent vlog, Anushka shared that she initially struggled with the idea of IVF, admitting that she wrongly associated the procedure with a personal shortcoming. She also called for greater awareness around fertility treatments and urged people to stop treating IVF as a taboo subject.

articles.title: "They're in a lavender marriage": Taylor Swift and Travis Kelce face fresh sexuality rumors as podcast guest questions authenticity of romance
articles.description: A viral podcast clip has reignited debate around Taylor Swift and Travis Kelce's relationship, wedding rumors, and long-running speculation about their identities. During the discussion, guests questioned whether the romance is genuine and floated unverified theories about both stars. The comments quickly spread online, drawing mixed reactions from fans. While neither Swift nor Kelce has addressed the claims, the controversy has added fresh attention to one of entertainment's most closely watched couples.

articles.title: "Cheated on her husband with the kids karate teacher": Tom Brady’s ex Gisele Bundchen reignites old scandal as Barstool analyst drops explosive cheating claim
articles.description: Tom Brady and Gisele Bundchen’s past relationship is back in the spotlight after Barstool analyst Dante Deiana criticized the supermodel and revived allegations surrounding their split. The comments came as social media users debated Bundchen’s recent tribute to her husband, Joaquim Valente. While some fans defended Brady and questioned Bundchen’s actions, others argued she had no obligation to acknowledge her ex. Brady has not publicly responded to the controversy.

articles.title: Quote of the day by the Blonde Bombshell Marilyn Monroe: ‘It's often just enough to be with someone. I don't need...’ – Reflection on human connection and comfort of not being alone
articles.description: Marilyn Monroe's profound quote, 'It's often just enough to be with someone. I don't need to touch them. Not even talk. A feeling passes between you both. You're not alone,' highlights the power of silent companionship. Despite her glamorous life, Monroe understood that true connection transcends words, offering solace through mere presence.

articles.title: Commentary: Why Dear You hit us so hard – and what it says about our feelings toward ‘dialects’
articles.description: At its heart, the fervour around the Teochew-language film is not about disagreement with Singapore’s language policy. It is grief for a dying language, says NTU linguistics professor Tan Ying Ying.

articles.title: Taylor Swift-Travis Kelce wedding: Couple file permit for street closure, space for tents ahead of multi-day celebrations
articles.description: Excitement is building as Taylor Swift and Travis Kelce's wedding preparations are reportedly underway at Madison Square Garden. Street closures are being planned for early July, hinting at a grand celebration. Sources suggest the iconic venue is booked for multiple days, with a major event on July 3. Even NFL stars are making travel plans, and celebrity guests are expected to attend this highly anticipated union.

articles.title: “I didn’t care what happened to me”: Megan Thee Stallion opens up about depression as drama with Klay Thompson gets worse
articles.description: Megan Thee Stallion, the three time Grammy winner, has had a pretty painful break up with Klay Thompson after being with him for a year and being pretty public about it. This has also sparked concern about her well being since Megan Thee Stallion was previously public about her struggle with depression and the scary thoughts she has had.

articles.title: Vindu says Dara Singh warned him against interfaith marriage
articles.description: Vindu Dara Singh has opened up about his former marriage to actor and Tabu's sister, Farah Naaz, admitting that his father, wrestling legend Dara Singh, had cautioned him about the challenges of an interfaith marriage. Vindu reflected on a piece of advice from his father that he chose not to follow. While stressing that he has no regrets because the marriage gave him his son Fateh, the actor said Dara Singh's concerns eventually proved to be correct.

articles.title: Quote of the day by Niccolò Machiavelli: 'The child who obeys you out of fear will one day lie to you for freedom...' Why fear can create obedience in children but not honesty explained by Italian Renaissance era philosopher
articles.description: Niccolò Machiavelli’s widely shared quote, “The child who obeys you out of fear will one day lie to you for freedom,” reflects on the limits of fear-based authority and suggests that obedience driven by intimidation can undermine trust and honesty. The message extends beyond parenting, highlighting how excessive control may lead people to seek freedom through secrecy rather than open communication.

articles.title: Raveena Tandon lauds Akshay Kumar's growth as an actor
articles.description: Raveena Tandon and Akshay Kumar are all set to reunite on the big screen after a gap of 22 years with Welcome To The Jungle. The actors, who have shared screen space in several popular films over the years, were last seen together in Police Force: An Inside Story in 2004. For Raveena, returning to the sets alongside Akshay Kumar, Suniel Shetty and director Ahmed Khan felt less like work and more like a reunion of old friends.

articles.title: CPM opposes Centre’s move to include residential areas in ESZ
articles.description: CPM urges Centre to halt move to include residential areas in Western Ghats ESZ, alleging expert panel rejected Kerala’s exclusion proposal without field surveys.

articles.description: Kerala CM VD Satheesan denies mineral sand mining privatisation plan in budget; backs value addition, critical mineral corridor JV and investor-friendly reforms.

articles.description: It is expected to be released in 2027. After delivering a terrific performance as Na Hwa-jin in 'Teach You A Lesson,' Kim Mu-yeol is set to star in a medical drama titled 'First Doctor.'

articles.description: Fresh speculation suggests that Salman Khan could be associated with Karna, the ambitious mythological drama that was once set to mark Suriya's Bollywood debut. While nothing has been officially confirmed, the buzz has reignited interest in the long-shelved project.

articles.description: Zendaya shared a rare intimate photo with husband Tom Holland from their 'Spider-Man: Brand New Day' press tour in Rome, thrilling fans. This comes after Holland confirmed the couple had secretly married, debunking fake AI-generated wedding photos.

articles.description: Bhojpuri star Akshara Singh is all praise for Akshay Kumar after their collaboration on 'Ghis Ghis Ghis'. She revealed he shot the 'Welcome To The Jungle' song despite a 104-degree fever and recalled her own fangirl moment.

articles.title: SS Rajamouli Seems Like A 'New Director' On Varanasi Sets, Says Prithviraj Sukumaran - Here's Why
articles.description: Prithviraj Sukumaran praised SS Rajamouli’s work ethic on the sets of Varanasi, saying the filmmaker behaves like a new director making his first dream project. The actor called him the hardest-working director he has worked with.

articles.title: 10 beautiful baby girl names inspired by ancient goddesses and their powerful meanings
articles.description: Choosing a name for a baby girl is one of the most meaningful decisions parents make. Many families look for names that are not only beautiful but also carry a rich history and a powerful meaning. One fascinating source of inspiration is the ancient world, where goddesses were worshipped as symbols of wisdom, love, strength, beauty, and protection. Thousands of years later, these names continue to inspire parents around the world. They are timeless, elegant, and filled with stories that have survived generations. Here are 10 beautiful baby girl names inspired by ancient goddesses and the powerful meanings behind them.

articles.description: Director Rahul Sankrityan has opened up about casting The Mummy star Arnold Vosloo as the antagonist in Vijay Deverakonda's upcoming historical epic Ranabaali. The filmmaker recalled being star-struck upon meeting the Hollywood actor.

articles.title: Mumbai–Bengaluru Vande Bharat corridor: 5 destinations worth exploring along the route
articles.description: Mumbai-Bengaluru Vande Bharat is one of the most awaited trains in India. The route will run between Mumbai's Chhatrapati Shivaji Maharaj Terminus (CSMT) and Bengaluru's KSR station, and as per reports, the train will reduce travel time from over 20 hours to roughly 14–17 hours.

articles.description: Akshay Kumar believes today's actresses enter the industry better prepared than ever before, but says they are often less willing to take risks.

articles.description: They first sparked dating rumours in 2023. For quite a few years, BLACKPINK's Lisa has been rumoured to be dating Frédéric Arnault, but fresh speculation suggests the pair may no longer be together.

articles.title: Anand Mahindra offers help to 80-year-old who plays his 40-year-old broken violin on the pavement daily
articles.description: Mahindra Group Chairman Anand Mahindra has pledged support to an 80-year-old violinist, Bhagwan Mallick, whose poignant video went viral. Mallick, despite failing eyesight and a broken violin, plays daily on the pavement, earning a meager ₹100 to support his wife. Mahindra's offer has sparked wider calls for structured support networks for vulnerable individuals, highlighting the resilience and dignity of those facing extreme poverty.

articles.description: Kerala Lottery Results Today: Excitement builds as Kerala's DhanaLekshmi DL-58 lottery is set to reveal its winning numbers today, June 24, 2026. A staggering ₹1 crore awaits the first prize winner, with numerous other substantial prizes also up for grabs. The Kerala State Lotteries Department ensures transparency, with results available online and for official confirmation. Winners are advised on claiming their fortunes.

articles.title: Hansika Motwanni visits Tirupati Temple, shares breathtaking morning glimpse
articles.description: Tirupati Temple: Situated atop the seventh peak of the Seshachalam Hills, the Tirumala Venkateswara Temple is among India's most prominent Hindu shrines.
